texto: You talked to us about what kind of fifth-graders we wanted to be this year. How it was all in our choices, every minute of our days. How even grownups like you had to think about it sometimes, to be the person they wanted to be.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a W.H. Beck: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “You talked to us about what kind of fifth-graders we wanted to be this year. How it was all in ou…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, choices, about pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
